MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Defendant John Beck telephone number 415-420-9581 in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT JOHN BECK'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. All funds held are to be returned to the Judgment Debtor. The Court will prepare a form of order.
